title: GR EPSEEK: TRAINING SEARCH AGENTS FOR DIRECT CORPUS INTERACTION

defines.name: GrepSeek
defines.definition: A direct corpus interaction search agent that learns to find, filter, and compose evidence from large text corpora by issuing executable shell commands.

problem: Existing retrieval-augmented search agents depend on pre-computed indices and document-level retrieval, which limits fine-grained corpus access and makes direct, controllable evidence search difficult at scale.
